Explicitly required by task.json description and verified by expected_dash matching in verifier.py
Explicitly required by task.json description and verified by threshold logic checking for '5' in verifier.py
Explicitly required by task.json description and verified by threshold logic checking for '3' in verifier.py
Explicitly required by task.json description and verified by panel_count >= 2 check in verifier.py
Configured in install_splunk.sh user-seed.conf and used across all API requests in task_utils.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub (Zenodo record 8196385). Splunk Enterprise is pre-configured with the credentials 'admin' and 'SplunkAdmin1!'. The agent must successfully create an alert named exactly 'Password_Spray_Detection' utilizing distinct user count logic with a minimum threshold of 5 users and a maximum attempt ratio of 3. Furthermore, a dashboard named exactly 'Password_Spray_Dashboard' with at least 2 visualization panels must be created.
